name: Booking Holdings
analysis: BKNG's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 28% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry $167.5520, stop $156.5388, target $184.4779 (1.54:1) — then trail it.
